item.title: Linux
item.description: This section contains my Linux learning notes, command references, Fedora Atomic setup notes, terminal workflows, and practical administration topics.

item.title: Homelab
item.description: This section contains notes about my personal lab environment, infrastructure layout, services, and experiments that support security, cloud, and administration learning.

item.title: Windows
item.description: This section contains my Windows administration notes, support references, and practical knowledge for desktop and endpoint troubleshooting.

item.title: Networking
item.description: This section contains my networking notes covering core concepts, practical lab work, and references that support security, Linux, and cloud learning.

item.title: Security
item.description: This section contains my security notes focused on beginner-friendly blue-team learning, SOC concepts, detection basics, and lab documentation.

item.title: Cloud
item.description: This section contains my cloud notes for AWS, Azure, infrastructure as code, and practical deployment learning.

item.title: Microsoft
item.description: This section contains my Microsoft ecosystem notes focused on Microsoft 365, Entra ID, Intune, Teams, SharePoint, and practical support administration.

item.title: Git
item.description: This section contains my Git and GitHub notes, including version control basics, repository workflows, and portfolio publishing steps.

item.title: Scripting
item.description: This section contains my scripting notes for Bash, PowerShell, Python basics, and automation ideas that support administration and technical work.

item.title: Troubleshooting
item.description: This section contains troubleshooting notes, diagnostic workflows, and practical fixes gathered while working through labs, systems, and support tasks.
